seoTitle: How to Create an Animated Lyrics Video in Canva
metaDescription: Turn a song into a shareable animated lyrics video using Canva's video editor — add synced text, graphics, and audio without any prior editing experience.
intro: Animated lyrics videos are an easy way to promote a song release or add visual interest to a music channel, and Canva makes the process approachable even if you've never edited video before. This guide covers building the video, syncing text to audio, and exporting a finished clip ready to share.

steps.heading: Start a video project in Canva
steps.body: Open a new video design and choose a canvas size that matches where you'll publish, such as a square or vertical format for social platforms.

steps.heading: Add and time your text to the audio
steps.body: Upload your audio track, then add text elements for each lyric line and adjust their timing on the timeline so words appear as they're sung.

steps.heading: Animate the text and add supporting graphics
steps.body: Apply text animations for movement and pair them with background images, colors, or shapes that match the mood of the song.

steps.heading: Preview timing across the whole track
steps.body: Play through the full video to check that lyrics stay in sync with the audio, adjusting any clips that drift off timing.

steps.heading: Export and share your video
steps.body: Once you're happy with the sync and visuals, export the finished video in a format suited to your platform, whether that's a music channel, social feed, or promotional page.

faq.question: Can I use my own music file in Canva for a lyrics video?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload your own audio track and use it as the base for timing your animated lyrics.

faq.question: Do I need design experience to make a lyrics video in Canva?
faq.answer: No, the tutorial is built for beginners, walking through each step from adding text to exporting the final video.

faq.question: Can I customize the font and colors of the lyrics?
faq.answer: Yes, every text element in Canva can be restyled with different fonts, colors, and animation effects to match your brand or song.

faq.question: What format should I export my lyrics video in?
faq.answer: Canva lets you export as a standard video file suitable for most platforms, so choose the size and format that fits where you plan to publish it.
